description_long: This is a medium-sized, freestanding wooden shelving unit with a natural finish, featuring three open shelves and a solid top surface. The front and back are open, with vertical supports dividing the shelves into three sections, allowing for visibility and access from both sides. The sides are solid wood panels, each with a smooth, slightly matte surface and visible wood grain patterns. The construction appears sturdy, with thick planks and no visible fasteners or decorative elements. The open design makes it suitable for storing or displaying items in accessible urban environments such as sidewalks, garages, or parks. The overall appearance is functional and minimalist, emphasizing practicality and durability.
description: A sturdy, natural wood shelving unit with three open shelves and a minimalist, open-backed design. The solid side panels and visible wood grain give it a functional and durable appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing three open shelves divided into three sections by vertical supports, with a solid top and side panels.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a solid wood panel with visible grain and no openings or features.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing the open back with three vertical supports and open shelves, mirroring the front but without a solid face.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to view 1, showing a solid wood panel with visible grain.
